message: fix(docker): Remove non-existent package references from Dockerfile

files.patch:
@@ -25,10 +25,6 @@ FROM base AS dependencies
 # Copy package files
 COPY package*.json ./
 COPY agentic-flow/package*.json ./agentic-flow/
-COPY packages/agentdb/package*.json ./packages/agentdb/
-COPY packages/agent-booster/package*.json ./packages/agent-booster/
-COPY packages/reasoningbank/package*.json ./packages/reasoningbank/
-COPY packages/agentic-jujutsu/package*.json ./packages/agentic-jujutsu/
 
 # Install dependencies
 RUN npm ci --only=production --ignore-scripts
@@ -44,7 +40,6 @@ COPY --from=dependencies /app/package*.json ./
 
 # Copy source code
 COPY agentic-flow ./agentic-flow
-COPY packages ./packages
 COPY tsconfig.json ./
 
 # Build the project
@@ -66,7 +61,6 @@ WORKDIR /app
 
 # Copy built artifacts
 COPY --from=builder /app/agentic-flow/dist ./agentic-flow/dist
-COPY --from=builder /app/packages ./packages
 COPY --from=dependencies /app/node_modules ./node_modules
 COPY package*.json ./
